# Fujin UI Toolset
> Mantine v7-based UI component library for web and React Native projects.
> All components are token-driven, sharp-edged, and workstation-focused.

## Repository Structure
- `tokens.json`         — Single source of truth for all design values
- `components/`         — All UI components
- `llms-full.txt`       — Full component API reference and usage examples

## Core Rules (Non-Negotiable)
1. All colors, spacing, radius, and typography MUST reference `tokens.json`. No hardcoded values.
2. All `borderRadius` MUST be `tokens.radius.default` (value: 0). Sharp edges everywhere.
3. No Mantine theme override — components use inline `style` props; colors via CSS custom properties (`var(--fujin-*)`).
4. All color references in components MUST use `var(--fujin-*)` CSS custom properties — never `tokens.color.*` directly.
5. Progressive disclosure: if a card has >2 actions, overflow into `ActionMenu`. If a workflow has >3 steps, use `WorkflowStepper`.

## Token Contract Summary
- Palette:    Slate (10-step, dark-first)
- Spacing:    4px base, scale: xs(10) sm(12) md(16) lg(20) xl(24) xxl(32)
- Typography: Verdana → system font stack; JetBrains Mono for monospace
- Radius:     0 on all sizes
- Themes:     Dark + Light (CSS custom properties via FujinThemeProvider; toggle with useFujinTheme)

## Component Index
- `ToolShell`        — App shell with collapsible left rail navigation
- `DataCard`         — Card with progressive disclosure and action overflow
- `WorkflowStepper`  — Multi-step workflow with per-step validation
- `FormShell`        — Form layout wrapper with error display and submit state
- `StatusBadge`      — Status indicator badge (success/danger/warning/info/neutral)
- `ActionMenu`       — Standalone overflow action menu (⋯ trigger)
- `SectionHeader`    — Panel/section header with optional right-side action slot
- `DataTable`        — Sortable, paginated data table with loading and empty states
- `FujinToastProvider` — Imperative toast notification system via context and portals

## Import Path
```ts
import { 
  ToolShell, DataCard, WorkflowStepper, FormShell, StatusBadge, 
  ActionMenu, SectionHeader, DataTable, FujinToastProvider, useToast 
} from './components';
import type { 
  NavItem, CardAction, WorkflowStep, FormShellProps, 
  DataColumn, SortDirection, ToastOptions, ToastStatus 
} from './components';
```

## Agent Boundaries
- Fujin: UI components, tokens, layout, progressive disclosure logic
- Raiden: File structure, scaffolding, CI/CD, backend integration
